emails.subject: Meter 986899 For November
emails.body: Meter 986899 For November Daren, I have flow at this meter for the first, 118 Dth. There is an expired purchase from Highland at the meter, but, this deal ended August 31st. HPL had a deal with Highland in October to purchase these volumes (deal ticket 418382). I think that the deal needs to be extended, it looks like the valve was not completely shut by 9 am. Pat has asked that this issue be resolved today, so, your assistance would be greatly appreciated. Mary
